rate_distortion_limit_analysis.current_position: right at transparent floor (8 kbps, marginal headroom)
rate_distortion_limit_analysis.compression_efficiency: 48x vs raw — at production codec parity

limits_identified.statement: 8 kbps is at perceptual-entropy floor; further compression requires perceptual model (psychoacoustic masking)
8 stages × 2^10 entries = 80 bits/frame discrete code; quantization error scales as 2^(-bits) ≈ 8.27e-25 in vector dimension
limits_identified.perceptual_relevance: below pitch JND for normal speech

limits_identified.statement: Lyra v2 = 3.2 kbps with neural decoder; HEXA at 8 kbps is 2.5x above SOTA neural floor
limits_identified.implication: compression headroom exists if neural decoder upgrades
